capacity_evidence.note: At the emitted batch 32, a full 131072-token BF16 key+value cache for one layer is 16 GiB before allocator overhead, activations, weights, and temporary buffers. This exceeds the local single-chip DRAM budget used by this functional decoder validation, so this stage validates the forge-emitted cache length 128 and defers larger-context cache work to later stages.

prefill.reason: The forge emit does not contain a TTNN prefill graph. model_pt.py performs CPU prefill to populate StaticCache before the emitted TTNN workload.

decode.reason: main.py sets NUM_TOKENS_PER_SAMPLE=1 and passes input_ids, cache_position, and persistent per-layer key/value caches into ModelTTNN.

notes: This is a forge-seeded functional starting point, not optimized-decoder, multichip, full-model, or vLLM.
The emitted workload validates decode at the forge static cache length 128. Larger cache lengths are deferred to later stages and are not claimed as measured evidence here.
Runtime forwards contain no torch, ttnn.from_torch, or ttnn.to_torch host fallback.
